_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA cert fixture grounded in Lothaire (2002) ISBN 978-0-521-81220-7 Ch.2 (Sturmian complexity p(n)=n+1) and Hardy+Wright (2008) ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5. -->
description: Claims (RLLR)^8 has Sturmian complexity p(2)=3. Wrong: p(2)=4 for this periodic word (RL,LL,LR,RR all appear). Period-4 words cannot be Sturmian.
